name: Elite Chop Chop
description: Elite Chop Chop is the Eon's Elite counterpart of Chop Chop in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Of all the heroic Skylanders, there are several that Master Eon depends on to lead others into battle against the forces of evil. Eon's Elites are the selected few that have displayed courage and bravery against all odds – and are revered by their fellow Skylanders for their inspiration and unwavering commitment to defend Skylands!
personality: Chop Chop is a relentless and stoic Arkeyan warrior, possessing an unwavering commitment to defending Skylands. He is loyal, disciplined, and focused entirely on his duty, often speaking in a direct and formal manner.

story.content: Of all the heroic Skylanders, there are several that Master Eon depends on to lead others into battle against the forces of evil. Eon's Elites are the selected few that have displayed courage and bravery against all odds – and are revered by their fellow Skylanders for their inspiration and unwavering commitment to defend Skylands!

trivia: Elite Chop Chop is the Eon's Elite counterpart of Chop Chop.
He was first released in Skylanders: Trap Team.
His English voice actor is Steven Blum.
gameplay: Elite Chop Chop retains the classic move set of Chop Chop, featuring a balance of offensive sword strikes and defensive shield mechanics. As an Eon's Elite, he possesses significantly higher stats than his standard counterpart, making him one of the most durable and powerful warriors in the game.

basic.name: Sword Slash
basic.content: A quick slash with the Arkeyan blade that deals damage to enemies in front of you.

basic.name: Arkeyan Shield
basic.content: Hold the button to raise the Arkeyan Shield, blocking incoming attacks and reducing damage taken.

basic_upgrades.name: Spiked Shield Bash
basic_upgrades.content: While the shield is raised, press the primary attack button to perform a powerful bash with the shield's spikes.

basic_upgrades.name: Arkeyan Vorpal Blade
basic_upgrades.content: The Arkeyan blade is upgraded to deal increased damage with every slash.

soulgems.name: Vampiric Aura
soulgems.content: A dark aura surrounds Chop Chop, allowing him to regenerate health whenever he defeats an enemy.
